section.heading: Corporate succession and powers and duties acting as trustee; personal liability for malfeasance

subsection.heading: Perpetual Succession.—
subsection.content: The National Park Foundation shall have perpetual succession.

subsection.heading: Powers and Duties of Trustee.—
subsection.content: The National Park Foundation shall have all the usual powers and obligations of a corporation acting as a trustee, including the power to sue and to be sued in its own name.

subsection.heading: Personal Liability of Board Members.—
subsection.content: The members of the Board shall not be personally liable, except for malfeasance.

html:td.style: text-align:left; vertical-align:top; border-right:1px solid black; padding-right:2pt;
text-align:left; vertical-align:top; border-right:1px solid black; border-left:1px solid black; padding-right:2pt; padding-left: 2pt;
text-align:left; vertical-align:top; border-left:1px solid black; padding-left: 2pt;
